betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Moderator Lines§f:
Moderator Lines are the fuel cell + Zircaloy block stack that forms the active neutron-producing core of a Solid Fission Reactor. They are the "skeleton" of the reactor interior.

§6Fission Fuel Cell Crafting Recipe (CraftingRecipeHandler.java:276)§f:
Pattern "PTP / ZFZ / PTP" in a 3×3 grid. Letters: P = plateAdvanced, T = ingotTough, Z = ingotZircaloy, F = steelFrame. Yields 4 Fission Fuel Cells per craft.

§6Zircaloy Block Crafting Recipe§f:
The task also requires a Zircaloy Block (nuclearcraft:ingot_block, meta 8). Zircaloy is a zirconium-tin alloy made in the Alloy Furnace or Separator from dustZirconium + ingotTin. A standard 3×3 craft of 9 ingots yields 1 block.

§6What Fuel Cells Do§f:
- Hold fuel pellets/rods inserted from the controller
- Produce heat per tick based on fuel enrichment
- Emit neutrons that travel to adjacent cells
- Can be oriented in any of the 6 cardinal directions
- Form the lattice that moderators and reflectors surround

§6Fission Cell Port (CraftingRecipeHandler.java:236)§f:
Pattern "PHP / ZFZ / PHP" in a 3×3 grid. Letters: P = plateAdvanced, H = vanilla Hopper, Z = ingotZircaloy, F = steelFrame. Yields 4 Fission Cell Ports per craft. Cell Ports are heat-extracting versions of fuel cells that pump fluid (water, NaK, helium) for use in turbines.

§6Moderator Materials (FissionModeratorRecipes.java:18-20)§f:
Three materials act as moderators in the reactor:
- §bBlock Graphite§f: 1.0× flux factor, 0.5× efficiency
- §bBlock Beryllium§f: 1.5× flux factor, 0.8× efficiency
- §bHeavy Water Moderator§f (NC block): 2.0× flux factor, 1.0× efficiency (top tier)

These are placed as multiblock position blocks around the fuel cells. They slow fast neutrons to thermal energies, increasing fission cross-section.

§6Moderator Placement Rules§f:
- Place moderators in a 1-block-thick shell around the fuel cell cluster
- Heavier moderators (Beryllium, Heavy Water) outperform Graphite
- The Heavy Water Moderator requires Heavy Water Cells in a fabricator

§6Direct Descendants of Fission Fuel Cell (TaskRetrieval)§f:
The task items are:
- nuclearcraft:solid_fission_cell (Fission Fuel Cell)
- nuclearcraft:ingot_block:8 (Zircaloy Block) — used as cladding

§6Prerequisites§f:
Requires q30044 (Inside the Reactor) — the interior shell.

§eTip§f: Place Zircaloy Blocks on the wall face of fuel cells touching the reactor casing. This both reflects neutrons (Zircaloy has a small reflection effect) and provides structural integrity.

§eTip§f: Heavy Water Moderators are the most efficient. To mass-produce them, run the Chemical Reactor with deuterium + oxygen -> heavy_water -> fill cells -> empty cells into the Heavy Water Moderator fabricator.

§cWarning§f: Don't use Water as a moderator — it works but evaporates under heat, leaving an air gap that destroys the moderation. Always use Heavy Water for serious reactors.
